title: primula × dumoulinii
intro: Primula × dumoulinii, also known as the Drummond's or Cowslip Primrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the primrose family and is a cross between the Primula veris and Primula elatior species. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Primula × dumoulinii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried to make capsules or added to salves and creams for topical application.
